posts.title: [Freelance Contract] Japan Marketing - Review Daniel Kim's contract terms
posts.body: I drafted a 2-month short-term contract based on 8 hours/day starting next Wednesday (the 22nd). Sharing the contract draft (scope, term, payment date) — please review and reply. We plan to move to a long-term contract based on performance...

posts.title: Haruka Sano 2026 service contract renewal
posts.body: As the existing contract expires (5/31), I prepared a renewal contract. Compensation terms are the same, with video editing added to the scope. It follows the standard contract format and will proceed via e-signature. Please review and sign the contract...

posts.title: [Legal Review] Finalized standard contract format for local Japan freelancers
posts.body: Legal review of the standard contract format for local freelancers is complete. New contracts will be unified under this contract format going forward. Please check the attached contract template...

posts.title: Request to seal the exhibition booth vendor contract
posts.body: We need to seal the contract with the Japan IT Week booth construction vendor. Please review the amount and schedule, then approve...

posts.title: Memo: negotiating the ad agency annual contract terms
posts.body: We are negotiating annual contract terms with the Yahoo Japan / Google ad agencies. We are adjusting the minimum spend and commission-rate clauses in the contract...

comments.text: Reviewed the contract draft. Please change only the payment-date clause to 'end-of-month settlement.'

Sealed the contract via e-signature. I'll keep the original in the legal folder.
